---
title: "Interactive Demo"
format: revealjs
revealjs-plugins:
  - editable
filters:
  - editable
  - arrow
---

## Try Moving This Image

Drag the image to reposition it.

![](image.png){.editable width="200"}

## Edit This Text

Click the edit button to open the rich text editor.

::: {.editable}
**Try editing me!**

You can make text *italic*, **bold**, or ~~strikethrough~~.
:::

## Multiple Elements

::: {.editable}
Element 1
:::

::: {.editable}
Element 2
:::
